questions.scenario: A play targets `orders_web`, but the recap says no hosts matched. The inventory contains a group named `order_web` without the `s`. What is the best fix?

options.text: Rename the inventory group to `orders_web` or update the play so both names match.
Set `become: true` because unmatched hosts are a privilege issue.
Add a handler because handlers repair missing groups.

questions.explanation: A target mismatch happens before tasks run. The play and inventory need to agree on the group name.
